operationContent.note: Tenant A/B homepage sections, announcements and operation settings are isolated.

activityBoundary.note: Tenant A/B admin and public activity lists, details and writes are isolated.

exportBoundary.note: Tenant A/B registration exports do not include the other tenant's activity or registration data.

paymentBoundary.note: Tenant B cannot pay Tenant A orders, and sandbox callback ownership stays bound to the order tenant.

settlementBoundary.note: Tenant A/B agent settlement lists, details and exports are isolated.
